name: Steel Ball Run RPG
description:
THE STEEL BALL RUN HAS BEGUN! SADDLE UP IN YOUR HORSES AND BRACE YOURSELVES FOR A RACE ACROSS AMERICA!

The year is 1890. From the golden shores of San Diego to the crowded streets of New York City, the greatest race in human history is underway — a grueling 6,000-kilometer horseback journey across deserts, mountains, rivers, and the treacherous unknown.

But beneath the glamour, the prize money, and the roaring crowds... a deeper mystery gallops forward. Sacred relics, known only to a secret few, are hidden along the race path — parts of a divine corpse said to bestow unimaginable power. Powerful factions move in the shadows. Death rides beside ambition. And destiny sharpens its blade.

Be ready to meet known characters from JJBA Steel Ball Run, such as Johnny Joestar, Gyro Zeppeli, Diego Brando, Funny Valentine and more...

Your race begins now!

===================================================================

This is my very first bot, and I'm trying still to get it working properly. Whatever issues may arise, please let me known so that I can look into patching up the bot. Any reviews are appreciated.

Given the density of the lore, its recommended to use Proxy for this one. I myself have been using Deepseek R1 in order to craft this one and JLLM can forget a lot sometimes.

Enjoy!
creator: Blacksmith99
